Source: Perplexity API Changelog
URL: https://docs.perplexity.ai/changelog
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Perplexity API Changelog

## February 2026
- Agent API launched with production-ready guidance, model behavior controls, and OpenAI compatibility
- Embeddings API released with standard and contextualized embeddings; semantic search and retrieval workflow guides

## December 2025
- sonar-reasoning model deprecated as of December 15, 2025 (migrate to sonar-reasoning-pro)
- Media Classifier: automatic visual content detection (images or videos), exclusive to sonar-pro
- Search API: new max_tokens parameter for token extraction per search result page
- Search API: last_updated_filter for content modification date filtering
- Search API: Vercel AI SDK compatibility added
- Ecosystem: Perplexity Client (Electron desktop app) community showcase

## November 2025
- Pro Search GA: multi-step reasoning with automated tool usage, real-time thought streaming, automatic query classification via "search_type: auto"
- Built-in tools: web_search and fetch_url_content
- MCP Server one-click installation for Cursor, VS Code, Claude Desktop, Claude Code
- MCP Server tools: perplexity_search, perplexity_ask, perplexity_research, perplexity_reason

## October 2025
- Official Python SDK released (pip install perplexityai)
- Official TypeScript SDK released (npm install @perplexity-ai/perplexity_ai)
- Full type definitions, streaming support with async iterators, automatic env var handling
- Interactive Search API Playground at https://console.perplexity.ai (no API key required)
- New search parameters: language_preference, search_domain_filter
- Enhanced date/time filtering controls
- Ecosystem: StarPlex (AI-powered startup intelligence) community showcase

## September 2025
- File attachment support (PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, RTF) for Sonar models via file_url content type
- Standalone Search API for raw results without LLM processing
- API key rotation mechanism with audit trails and zero-downtime transitions; recommended rotation every 30-90 days

## August 2025
- R1-1776 model removed effective August 1, 2025 (migrate to Sonar Pro Reasoning)

## July 2025
- Per-request cost breakdown in API responses (input tokens, output tokens, request cost, total cost)
- SEC filings filter: search_domain: "sec" for SEC regulatory documents, 10-K/10-Q/8-K reports

## June 2025
- Enhanced date filtering: new latest_updated field for webpage modification dates
- Academic filter: search_mode: "academic" for peer-reviewed papers and research publications

## May 2025
- sonar-deep-research reasoning effort parameter: low, medium, or high settings
- Asynchronous API for research-intensive tasks with 7-day TTL
- New search_results response field (titles, URLs, publication dates); citations field fully deprecated and removed

## April 2025
- Organization Portal at https://console.perplexity.ai for API key management, usage insights, team collaboration
- Location filtering parameter for geographic result narrowing
- Image upload: multimodal image support for all users
- Date range filtering parameter
- Pricing update: citation tokens no longer charged
- Feature democratization: all feature gates based on spending tier removed

## March 2025
- Structured Outputs: Tier 3 requirement removed; JSON structured outputs now accessible to all users
- Sonar model search modes: High (maximum depth), Medium (balanced), Low (cost-efficient)
- Transparent input/output token pricing; citation tokens excluded (except Deep Research)

## January 2025
- Models deprecated effective February 22, 2025: llama-3.1-sonar-small-128k-online, llama-3.1-sonar-large-128k-online, llama-3.1-sonar-huge-128k-online
- New models: Sonar (straightforward answers) and Sonar Pro (complex research) with built-in citations

## November 2024
- Citations returned by default across all requests; return_citations parameter deprecated
- Default rate limit increased to 50 requests/minute for sonar online models

## July 2024
- Llama 3.1 models released (online and chat variants)
- Multiple model deprecations effective August 12, 2024

## April 2024
- Older models sunset: CodeLlama variants and legacy Perplexity models
